items.title: Filing: Anthropic spent $1.6M and OpenAI $1M on lobbying in Q1, vs. $360K and $560K in Q1 2025, respectively; Meta topped Big Tech lobbying spending with $7.1M (Ashley Gold/Axios)
items.title_original: Filing: Anthropic spent $1.6M and OpenAI $1M on lobbying in Q1, vs. $360K and $560K in Q1 2025, respectively; Meta topped Big Tech lobbying spending with $7.1M (Ashley Gold/Axios)
items.title_en: Filing: Anthropic spent $1.6M and OpenAI $1M on lobbying in Q1, vs. $360K and $560K in Q1 2025, respectively; Meta topped Big Tech lobbying spending with $7.1M (Ashley Gold/Axios)
items.title_zh: 备案：Anthropic 在第一季度的游说费用为 160 万美元，OpenAI 为 100 万美元，而 2025 年第一季度的游说费用分别为 36 万美元和 56 万美元； Meta 以 710 万美元位居科技巨头游说支出榜首（Ashley Gold/Axios）
items.title_bilingual: 备案：Anthropic 在第一季度的游说费用为 160 万美元，OpenAI 为 100 万美元，而 2025 年第一季度的游说费用分别为 36 万美元和 56 万美元； Meta 以 710 万美元位居科技巨头游说支出榜首（Ashley Gold/Axios） / Filing: Anthropic spent $1.6M and OpenAI $1M on lobbying in Q1, vs. $360K and $560K in Q1 2025, respectively; Meta topped Big Tech lobbying spending with $7.1M (Ashley Gold/Axios)
